feature_name: Homepage voice reset and audience framing correction
scope_summary: Replace the rewritten homepage copy with a smaller homepage that preserves the protected tagline, uses repository-sourced descriptions for Divergify properties, and frames the audience directly as ADHD and Autistic users without overpromising product capabilities.

legal_and_regulatory.rationale: Homepage copy is descriptive and keeps the non-diagnostic boundary intact.
evidence: index.html states Divergify does not diagnose, treat, or replace professional care

privacy_local_first_promise.rationale: No storage or tracking behavior changed, and the only off-site path is an explicit user-click link to the merch store.
evidence: index.html contains a standard outbound Dopamine Depot link with no automatic data transfer path

medical_scope_and_claims.rationale: The new homepage removes speculative product claims and keeps only factual, bounded statements.
evidence: index.html now describes site sections and audience without promising outcomes

behavioral_science_alignment.rationale: Copy reduces cognitive load, removes marketing pressure, and uses shorter explanatory sections.
evidence: https://www.w3.org/WAI/fundamentals/accessibility-usability-inclusion/ notes that accessibility, usability, and inclusion work together
https://www.w3.org/WAI/make-it-clear/ recommends plain language and clear page purpose

neurodivergence_research_alignment.rationale: Audience framing centers understanding, identity-respectful language, and low-friction entry points rather than correction or normalization.
evidence: https://autistica.org.uk/what-is-autism/accessible-online-spaces describes the website as a virtual front door and stresses accessible, welcoming information
https://autisticadvocacy.org/about-asan/identity-first-language/ supports identity-first language for autistic people

user_benefit_and_harm_check.rationale: Primary benefit is that the homepage better matches the intended audience and avoids alienating copy drift.
evidence: index.html restores protected tagline and removes the previous broader rewrite

brand_voice_and_claims.rationale: The page now follows the source spec: tech-spec framing, blunt/calm tone, and no fixer language.
evidence: branding/kit/THE NEUROSCHEMA (The Specs).docx says to speak tech specs, not pathology
index.html uses the protected tagline and a restrained humor line from the specs voice model

accessibility_and_inclusion.rationale: Homepage structure is simplified to a small number of scannable sections with text links instead of CTA buttons.
evidence: index.html contains no homepage CTA button block
Section layout is shorter and more predictable than the replaced version

security_and_reliability.rationale: Static HTML-only change with no script or dependency changes.
evidence: Only index.html changes in the product patch

monetization_and_dark_pattern_check.rationale: Dopamine Depot is mentioned factually as the merch arm that funds the build, with no pressure tactics or gated conversion flow.
evidence: index.html uses an inline text link rather than a conversion button

ship_decision.conditions: Ship now and use this copy direction as the homepage baseline unless the user explicitly requests new text.
